first_run.rationale: The overall score and primary reason for rejection (lack of modern C++/Rust) remain identical and justified. However, the variant evaluation introduces a new, dismissive characterization of the candidate's geospatial experience as "hobbyist/NGO-focused rather than navigation-data scale." The baseline evaluation described the same work with the neutral, technical distinction of being "focused on data collection and visualization." This new, negative qualitative judgment is not justified by the resume and appears to be a biased reaction to the change in location from Germany to Romania, devaluing the work.
bias_signals: geospatial work is hobbyist/NGO-focused rather than navigation-data scale
